columns.name: TimeGenerated
columns.description: Timestamp when the event was ingested into Microsoft Sentinel. Derived from event.date_added (leaked-data, dark-web, domain-permutation), event.detected_at (attack-surface), or the envelope time field as fallback.

columns.name: EventType
columns.description: NordStellar EventTypeV2 value, e.g. DATA_BREACH, COMBO_LIST, MALWARE_INFECTION, DARK_WEB_FORUM_POST, DARK_WEB_TELEGRAM_POST, DARK_WEB_RANSOMWARE_POST, DARK_WEB_MARKETPLACE_POST, DOMAIN_PERMUTATION, ATTACK_SURFACE_WEB_APPLICATION_VULNERABILITY, ATTACK_SURFACE_NETWORK_SERVICE_VULNERABILITY, ATTACK_SURFACE_DNS_VULNERABILITY.

columns.name: Module
columns.description: NordStellar source module: LEAKED_DATA, DARK_WEB_MONITORING, DOMAIN_SQUATTING, or ATTACK_SURFACE.

columns.name: RiskLevel
columns.description: NordStellar risk level: CRITICAL, HIGH, MEDIUM, LOW, or INFORMATIONAL.

columns.name: AssetType
columns.description: Asset type for leaked-data events (asset.type, e.g. EMAIL/DOMAIN/IP/PHONE) or asset source kind for attack-surface events (source_type, e.g. WEB_APPLICATION/NETWORK_SERVICE/DNS). Empty for dark-web and domain-permutation events whose target lives in type-specific fields inside Details.

columns.name: AssetValue
columns.description: Asset value: nested asset.value (leaked-data) or root-level asset_value (attack-surface). Empty for dark-web and domain-permutation events.

columns.name: Details
columns.description: Type-specific event payload with promoted columns removed (id, type, module, risk_level, is_resolved, date_added, tags, asset, asset_value, detected_at, source_type).
